name: Pharmacia
content:
Pharmacia is the main punk/alternative/rave bar in Limerick. Always a good crowd hanging out here, along with the chess club and whatever bands are in the area. Ireland has some of the nicest and well-behaved mosh pits I have ever been to.
A quick word of caution: I have mainly been to Pharma when the punk/emo/hardcore crowd was hanging out there, and they are all generally very nice people who will give you a hug after bumping into you too hard in a mosh pit (ok maybe that’s a little exaggerated, but you get the point). I have heard that the rave crowd is quite different. I am not saying to avoid them; if they are your people, you should go hang out with them. I just wanted to clarify that I can only tell you about some aspects of Pharmacia.
